title: MBA / PGDM Jobs 2026 – Chief Executive Officer / Chief Operating Officer
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) has recruits 1 Chief Executive Officer (CEO)/Chief Operating Officer (COO) Post. Candidates with Bachelor’s degree in Science/Engineering and relevant leadership experience can apply through email. The application process closes on 01-07-2026. Candidates should apply through the IIT Mandi website, iitmandi.ac.in.

basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Chief Executive Officer (CEO)/ Chief Operating Officer
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) has recruits 1 Chief Executive Officer (CEO)/Chief Operating Officer (COO) Post. Candidates with Bachelor’s degree in Science/Engineering and relevant leadership experience can apply through email. The application process closes on 01-07-2026. Candidates should apply through the IIT Mandi website, iitmandi.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Science, Engineering, and/or technical background is mandatory; Master's/Ph.D./MBA is preferred. Minimum 15 years of progressive industry/corporate experience with at least 5 years in a senior leadership/managerial role.
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in Science, Engineering, and/or technical background is mandatory. Master's/Ph.D./MBA is preferred. Minimum 15 years of progressive industry/corporate experience with at least 5 years in a senior leadership/managerial role in startup incubation, corporate innovation, venture building, entrepreneurship development, business strategy, technology commercialization, investment management, or ecosystem development.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Chief Executive Officer / Chief Operating Officer

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 01-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the IIT Mandi CEO/COO recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Mandi Chief Executive Officer (CEO)/Chief Operating Officer (COO) position is 01 July 2026.

faq.question: What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: A Bachelor's degree in Science, Engineering, or a technical background is mandatory. A Master's, Ph.D., or MBA is preferred.

faq.question: How many years of experience are needed?
faq.answer: A minimum of 15 years of progressive industry/corporate experience is required, with at least 5 years in a senior leadership or managerial role.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the applicant?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 55 years.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the CEO/COO role at IIT Mandi?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application should be submitted via Email.

faq.question: What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a Contractual job position.

faq.question: Where is IIT Mandi located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi is located in Mandi, Himachal Pradesh, with the pincode 175005.

faq.question: Can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: Yes, the official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article.
